A wavelet is a mathematical function used to divide a given function or continuous-time signal into different scale components.
A wavelet transform is the representation of a function by wavelets.
Wavelet transforms are classified into discrete wavelet transforms (DWTs) and continuous wavelet transforms (CWTs).
There are a number of generalized transforms of which the wavelet transform is a special case.
Another example of a generalized transform is the chirplet transform
Fractional wavelet transform (FRWT) is a generalization of the classical wavelet transform
